get.description: Returns the ISO 4217 currency catalog used by the API.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Items per page. Maximum 100.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Count strategy. exact keeps current total-count behavior, none skips totals, hasMore lets endpoints return whether another page exists when implemented.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: JSON-encoded recursive filter tree. Example: {"op":"AND","items":[{"field":"status","operator":"eq","value":"ACTIVE"}]}

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: JSON-encoded ordered sort rule list. Example: [{"field":"createdAt","direction":"desc"}]

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: JSON-encoded ordered list of requested columns. This is a validated presentation contract in v1.

get.description: Returns custom modules in the token organization. The response includes a schema summary by default.

post.description: Creates a custom module in the token organization for schema-managed custom objects.

get.description: Returns a custom module and its schema summary.

patch.description: Updates custom module metadata such as name, description, icon, color, active state, and hidden state.

parameters.name: confirmModuleKey
parameters.description: Must exactly match the module key to confirm destructive module deletion.

delete.description: Deletes the custom module after confirmModuleKey matches the path module key.

get.description: Returns object, record, rule, and custom-field-definition counts affected by deleting the module.
Returns the external-safe schema-builder context for a custom module, including objects, fields, references, record counts, and schema hash.

post.description: Creates a schema draft for object and field changes. Use clientMutationId for replay-safe draft creation.

patch.description: Replaces the editable schema draft document before validation or apply.

post.description: Validates the schema draft and stores the resulting plan/errors without applying metadata or DDL.
Validates and applies a schema draft. Destructive field/object deletes require explicit confirmations.

get.description: Returns schema-builder context scoped to one custom object.

post.description: Creates a create/update schema draft scoped to one custom object.

patch.description: Replaces the object-scoped schema draft document before validation or apply.

post.description: Validates one object-scoped schema draft without applying metadata or DDL.
Validates and applies one object-scoped schema draft.

get.description: Returns records, relationships, rules, billable sources, custom fields, attachments, and comments affected by deleting the object.

post.description: Deletes the custom object after confirmObjectKey matches and confirmDropTable is true.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated expandable field keys to inline in the response under _expanded. Supports REFERENCE, USER, USER_MULTI, CONTRACTOR, and CONTRACTOR_MULTI fields. E.g. "equipment_id,site_id". Dangling references resolve to null.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated expandable field keys. Only fields allowed by the object API exposure profile can be expanded.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated expandable field keys. Only fields allowed by the object API exposure profile can be expanded.

get.description: Returns Custom Scripts in the token organization.

patch.description: Updates script metadata, type, code, or metadata and recomputes validation when needed.

delete.description: Archives the Custom Script and returns no response body.

patch.description: Archives an active Custom Script in the token organization.
Restores an archived Custom Script in the token organization.

patch.description: Updates the service catalog item in the token organization.
Archives an active service catalog item. Repeating the call for an already archived item returns the archived item without a second state change.
Restores an archived service catalog item. Repeating the call for an already active item returns the active item without a second state change.

info.title: Opero API
info.description: Opero API authenticated with API tokens. Obtain a token via `POST /v1/organizations/{orgId}/api-tokens` on the internal API, then pass it as `Authorization: Bearer ek_...` on every request.

api-token.description: API token in the format `ek_<hex>`. Obtain from internal API.

fieldErrors.description: Per-field validation errors. Present only on VALIDATION_FAILED responses.

unavailableMutationScopes.description: Mutation scopes rejected because the corresponding View Layout block is not available in the current runtime contract.

clientMutationId.description: Client mutation id echoed on complex mutation errors when supplied.

relationTableErrors.description: Structured relation-table validation errors keyed by table field and row id/client id.

idempotencyConflict.description: Idempotency conflict metadata. Present when a clientMutationId cannot be replayed safely.

errors.description: Structured error list. Present on responses with multiple validation errors (e.g. SQL validation).

validation.description: Structured validation payload. Present on validation conflicts that include domain-specific validation state and errors.

key.description: Metadata key persisted on every dictionary entry.

type.description: Scalar value type accepted for this metadata key.

required.description: When true, dictionary entry create/save requires a non-null metadata value for this key.

entryMetadataSchema.description: Dictionary-level metadata schema applied to entry metadata. Empty means arbitrary scalar metadata is accepted.

total.description: Exact total item count. Present for count=exact and may be omitted for count=none or count=hasMore.

hasMore.description: Whether another page exists. Present for endpoints that implement count=hasMore.

metadata.description: Dictionary entry metadata as simple key-value pairs.

entryMetadataSchema.description: Dictionary-level metadata schema applied to entry metadata. Empty means arbitrary scalar metadata is accepted.

isHidden.description: Hide this module from the UI
Hide this module from the UI

createDefaultForm.description: Create a default dynamic form for VIEW, EDIT, and CREATE using all fields on this object.

clearFieldValues.description: Existing field ids whose stored values may be cleared by destructive field type or storage option changes.
Existing field ids whose stored values may be cleared by destructive field type or storage option changes.

operations.description: Operations enabled by this object API exposure profile.

values.description: Record values allowed by the object API exposure profile.

expanded.description: Expanded relation values keyed by field key.

files.description: File metadata keyed by FILE/FILES field key.

values.description: Writable custom field values for the target object.

key.description: Stable organization-local identifier used by layout bindings and UI references.

code.description: JavaScript function body or script body, depending on type.

usageCount.description: Number of layout/field bindings that reference this script.

contractorType.description: Contractor type key from the contractor_type dictionary

vatId.description: VAT ID (NIP for Polish contractors or equivalent)

riskStatus.description: Risk status key from the risk_status dictionary

accountManagerId.description: User ID of the account manager

replace.description: Complete replacement set. Omit addresses to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all addresses.
Complete replacement set. Omit contacts to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all contacts.
Complete replacement set. Omit bankAccounts to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all bank accounts.
Complete replacement set. Omit externalIds to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all external IDs.

subscriptionType.description: Key from the subscription_type dictionary (e.g. newsletter, invoice, report)

frequency.description: Key from the subscription_frequency dictionary (e.g. daily, weekly, monthly)

replace.description: Complete replacement set. Omit subscriptions to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all subscriptions.

fileId.description: Existing uploaded file ID to attach to this contractor document link.

replace.description: Complete replacement set of document links. Omit documents to leave unchanged; send [] to detach all document links without deleting File rows.

value.description: Value — pass null to clear the field. MULTI_SELECT, FILES, USER_MULTI, CONTRACTOR_MULTI, and CUSTOM_OBJECT_MULTI expect string arrays. FILE, USER, CONTRACTOR, and CUSTOM_OBJECT expect ID strings. CUSTOM_HTML expects { html, css? }; html/css support {{ path | filter }} templates. HTML_SECTION is readonly and must not be submitted as a value.

customFields.description: Custom field values to set during contractor create. Omit to leave custom fields empty.

workflowId.description: Workflow to start immediately after creating the contractor. Required when one or more active workflows apply to contractors; omit only when no active workflow applies.

validationConfig.description: Type-specific validation config. FILE displayMode may be "any" or "image"; FILES displayMode may be "any" or "gallery".

frontendMeta.description: Frontend-owned presentation metadata from the field definition.

renderedValue.description: Rendered CUSTOM_HTML/HTML_SECTION output. CUSTOM_HTML renders from value; HTML_SECTION renders from validationConfig.

resolvedValue.description: Resolved value for USER, USER_MULTI, CONTRACTOR, and CONTRACTOR_MULTI fields. Scalar fields return one reference object or null. Multi fields return an array preserving stored ID order, with null entries for dangling references.

file.description: Present for FILE fields when value contains a file id. Null means the stored id no longer resolves to a file.

files.description: Present for FILES fields when value contains file ids. Array order matches value; null entries mean stored ids no longer resolve to files.

contractorType.description: Contractor type key from the contractor_type dictionary

vatId.description: VAT ID (NIP for Polish contractors or equivalent)

riskStatus.description: Risk status key from the risk_status dictionary

accountManagerId.description: User ID of the account manager

values.description: Root contractor fields. Omit to leave root fields unchanged.

customFields.description: Custom field values to set during contractor save. Omit to leave custom fields unchanged.

unitsDictionaryId.description: Dictionary containing selectable units for this catalog item. Entry custom fields provide multipliers.

defaultUnitDictionaryEntryId.description: Default unit dictionary entry for this item. Must belong to unitsDictionaryId when provided.

salesBasePrice.description: Non-negative decimal. Decimal strings are accepted.

customFields.description: Custom field values saved in the same aggregate transaction as the item.

unitsDictionaryId.description: Dictionary containing selectable units for this catalog item. Entry custom fields provide multipliers.

defaultUnitDictionaryEntryId.description: Default unit dictionary entry for this item. Must belong to unitsDictionaryId when provided.

salesBasePrice.description: Non-negative decimal. Decimal strings are accepted.

customFields.description: Custom field values saved in the same aggregate transaction as the item.

uploadedBy.description: User or API token that uploaded the file.

entityType.description: API-supported target entity type. Use "contractor" for contractors or "custom_record.<moduleKey>.<objectKey>" for records of an exposed custom object, for example "custom_record.crm.deal".

createdBy.description: User or API token that created the attachment link.

entityId.description: Target entity identifier in the token organization.

entityType.description: API-supported target entity type. Use "contractor" for contractors or "custom_record.<moduleKey>.<objectKey>" for records of an exposed custom object, for example "custom_record.crm.deal".
API-supported target entity type. Use "contractor" for contractors or "custom_record.<moduleKey>.<objectKey>" for records of an exposed custom object, for example "custom_record.crm.deal".

author.description: User or API token that authored the comment.

entityId.description: Target entity identifier in the token organization.

body.example: Please verify the billing address before sending.
body.description: Comment body. Unsafe HTML is sanitized.

entityType.description: API-supported target entity type. Use "contractor" for contractors or "custom_record.<moduleKey>.<objectKey>" for records of an exposed custom object, for example "custom_record.crm.deal".

body.example: Please verify the billing address before sending.
body.description: Comment body. Unsafe HTML is sanitized.

description.description: Localised sentence explaining when this trigger fires.

category.description: Stable category key for grouping triggers in the UI. built_in = user/org/contractor, records = dynamic record events, custom_fields = custom field changes, other = manual etc.

categoryLabel.description: Localised category display label (language follows Accept-Language header).

isBuiltIn.description: True for schema-level fields, false for custom fields

config.description: Optional step config used to infer later context.

data.description: Context schema keyed by step position.

objectId.description: Custom object id required by record trigger types.

name.description: Optional display name for this step.

data.description: Input data available in the rule context as trigger.data.
